concept: I'd love a game where the player controls a character made entirely of reflected light who can only move along illuminated surfaces. Different colored light sources allow access to different paths and unlock various abilities when the character absorbs that particular light frequency. Environmental puzzles involve manipulating mirrors, prisms, and light sources to create pathways through otherwise inaccessible areas. The protagonist is attempting to escape from a vast scientific facility designed to contain and study light-based lifeforms. Shadow creatures hunt the player, forcing strategic use of darkness as temporary hiding spots despite the inability to move while concealed.
